title: Master Cord® Bungee Cords with Hooks Heavy Duty - Pack of 16 Military Grade, Weatherproof, UV-Resistant Elastic Bungee Straps with Locking Carabiner Hooks & Ball Bungees For Securing Tarps, Luggage
features: HEAVY DUTY BUNGEE CORDS: Simplify your next house move or DIY project with our Premium-Quality rubber bungie cords. Double Braided jackets on each bungee cord provide Heavy-Duty support. UV Resistant, All-Weather cords allow you to safely enjoy outdoor adventures year round including camping, hiking, boating & more!

RELIABLE: Ultra Strong weight bearing capacity of 30 kg, bungee straps with hooks help you tie & secure objects with peace of mind! Flexible elastic bungy cords can extend up to 2X their size, perfect for securing items of ANY SHAPE or SIZE. COLOR CODED DESIGN allows you to easily identify different lengths of cords!

VERSATILE: From furniture to appliances, enjoy the ultimate flexibility & reliability. Innovative Carabiner steel hooks with LOCK ensures that the cord never escapes the objects being tied. Safe & reliable choice for tying heavy objects or trekking mountain tops. Enjoy a variety of sizes including mini cords, ball bungees & tarp clips to meet your needs.

IDEAL FOR CAMPING: Secure your tents, tarps, sleeping bags and camping gear with our long-lasting bungee cords and BONUS accessories. 3 pc 18” & 3 pc 24” bungee cords include innovative protective layer of plastic coating above steel hooks. This protects against scratches & rust– ideal for outdoor weather.

COMPLETE PACKAGE (16 PIECES): 3 Pcs 18" Bungee Cords with Plastic Coated Steel Hooks, 3 Pcs 24" Bungee Cords with Plastic Coated Steel Hooks, 2 Pcs 30" Bungee Cords with Carabiner Hooks, 2 Pcs 40" Bungee Cords with Carabiner Hooks, 3 Pcs 4" Ball Bungees, 3 Pcs 10" Mini Cords, BONUS Storage Bag with Zipper.
description: Product Description What's Included In MasterCord 16pcs Bungee Cords Pack? 1 x Carry-able storage bag 2 x 40" Carabiner hook bungee cords 2 x 30" Carabiner hook bungee cords 3 x 24" Reinforced plastic coated steel hook bungee cords 3 x 18" Reinforced plastic coated steel hook bungee cords 3 x 4" ball bungees & 3 x 10" mini cords Why it's important to have MasterCord Bungee Cords? The bungee cord set will meet all your travel, yard-work, cargo, camping, and home storage needs. A vital tool for securing cargo and loads on bikes, cars, trucks, trailers & RVs. The Advantages: Multiple uses Assorted Sizes Fast & easy to use High grade materials Reliable &. longer life Enhanced tension power Easy to carry with zipper bag
